content.situation: 答辩委员会主席在会议开始时向答辩人致意并要求确认身份
content.speakerText: Good morning. Could you please state your name and the title of your thesis?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，请说明一下您的姓名和论文题目。
content.responseTemplate: Good morning, Professor. I'm ___ and my thesis is '___'.

blanks.answer: The Impact of Remote Learning on Student Engagement
options: The Impact of Remote Learning on Student Engagement

content.hint: 使用完整姓名和正式论文标题，避免口语化缩写或不完整表达。
content.knowledgePoint: 正式场合的身份确认表达

content.situation: 委员会成员在答辩开始前礼貌询问答辩人是否准备就绪
content.speakerText: We're all set here. Are you ready to begin your presentation?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们这边都准备好了，你准备好开始陈述了吗？
content.hint: 表达自信与专业性，避免过于随意或犹豫的措辞。
content.knowledgePoint: 回应开场确认时的自信表达

content.situation: 答辩人进入答辩室后，委员会成员微笑致意并示意开始
content.speakerText: Welcome. We're looking forward to hearing your work.
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎。我们很期待听取您的研究成果。
content.responseTemplate: Thank you. I'm honored to be here and ___ to share my findings.
content.hint: 使用正式且得体的形容词表达积极态度，避免口语化动词。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达感谢与期待的正式措辞
